sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62252" key="leionth=" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειοντῆ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λεοντῆ</foreign>, <sense id="n62252.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lion's skin,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.185</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
